name.title: Project Name
name.description: Short name for this project (used in folder and branch name)

issueTitle.title: Issue Title
issueTitle.description: Title of the GitHub issue (auto-filled by script if gh CLI is available)

issueBody.title: Issue Body
issueBody.description: Body of the issue (auto-filled by script if gh CLI is available, or paste manually)

baseBranch.title: Base Branch
baseBranch.description: Branch to base off (default: main or master)

prompt.title: Additional Instructions
prompt.description: Extra instructions for Claude beyond the issue body
